commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Contributor action is needed for both the MCP source-propagation fix and real behavior proof, so this should not be sent to an automated repair lane yet.; Needs attention: The patch still has a requester-source propagation gap in the MCP loopback trust boundary.; Review finding: [P1] Preserve requester source through MCP loopback — src/agents/cli-runner/prepare.ts:290 (sha=dae0ea5d3376736b8b0de267bb908e4c1e61a226)
commands.review_summary:
The PR hardens Discord moderation/guild-admin message actions by requiring trusted requester identity and threads sender context through agent, gateway, MCP, and outbound message-action paths.

PR surface: Source +310, Tests +633. Total +943 across 40 files.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: Discord Voice enters with messageChannel discord and messageProvider discord-voice, while the PR's MCP loopback preparation uses messageChannel first and tool resolution has no separate agentSourceProvider handoff. I did not run a live Discord reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor action is needed for both the MCP source-propagation fix and real behavior proof, so this should not be sent to an automated repair lane yet.

target.title: fix(discord): require sender context for moderation actions
target.body:
## Summary

- Require trusted Discord requester context before privileged Discord moderation and guild-admin message actions can use requester identity.
- Carry requester identity through CLI, MCP loopback, and gateway message-action paths without relying on client-controlled sender headers.
- Keep deliverable channel routing on the routeable provider while carrying non-deliverable requester source providers separately.

## Verification

- `git diff --name-only origin/main..HEAD -- '*.ts' | xargs -r ./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint-shards.mjs --threads=8`
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.core.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core-test.tsbuildinfo`
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.extensions.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/extensions-test.tsbuildinfo`
- `node scripts/check-tsgo-core-boundary.mjs`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/discord/src/channel-actions.test.ts extensions/discord/src/actions/handle-action.test.ts extensions/discord/src/actions/runtime.test.ts extensions/discord/src/voice/manager.e2e.test.ts src/channels/plugins/message-actions.security.test.ts src/agents/command/attempt-execution.cli.test.ts src/agents/cli-runner/prepare.test.ts src/agents/tools/message-tool.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.test.ts src/gateway/mcp-http.test.ts src/gateway/tool-resolution.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/send.test.ts src/gateway/server/ws-connection/message-handler.post-connect-health.test.ts src/infra/outbound/message-action-runner.plugin-dispatch.test.ts src/agents/workspace-templates.test.ts src/agents/tools/pdf-tool.model-config.test.ts src/crestodian/rescue-message.test.ts src/tasks/task-flow-registry.store.test.ts`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Discord privileged moderation and guild-admin message actions now require a trusted Discord requester or trusted local owner context, and Gateway/MCP paths no longer let non-admin callers spoof requester sender identity across channel boundaries.

Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw source checkout on Linux/UTC, Node `v22.22.2`, pnpm `11.2.2`, branch `discord-action-sender-guard`, exact PR head `dae0ea5d3376736b8b0de267bb908e4c1e61a226` rebased on `origin/main`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:
```bash
git diff --name-only origin/main..HEAD -- '*.ts' | xargs -r ./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1
node scripts/run-oxlint-shards.mjs --threads=8
node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.core.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core-test.tsbuildinfo
node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.extensions.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/extensions-test.tsbuildinfo
node scripts/check-tsgo-core-boundary.mjs
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/discord/src/channel-actions.test.ts extensions/discord/src/actions/handle-action.test.ts extensions/discord/src/actions/runtime.test.ts extensions/discord/src/voice/manager.e2e.test.ts src/channels/plugins/message-actions.security.test.ts src/agents/command/attempt-execution.cli.test.ts src/agents/cli-runner/prepare.test.ts src/agents/tools/message-tool.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.test.ts src/gateway/mcp-http.test.ts src/gateway/tool-resolution.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/send.test.ts src/gateway/server/ws-connection/message-handler.post-connect-health.test.ts src/infra/outbound/message-action-runner.plugin-dispatch.test.ts src/agents/workspace-templates.test.ts src/agents/tools/pdf-tool.model-config.test.ts src/crestodian/rescue-message.test.ts src/tasks/task-flow-registry.store.test.ts
.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main
```

Evidence after fix: Copied terminal output from the local run on the exact PR head:
```text
$ node --version
v22.22.2
$ corepack pnpm --version
11.2.2
$ git rev-parse HEAD
dae0ea5d3376736b8b0de267bb908e4c1e61a226

$ git diff --name-only origin/main..HEAD -- '*.ts' | xargs -r ./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1
Checking formatting...

All matched files use the correct format.
Finished in 124ms on 40 files using 1 threads.

$ node scripts/run-oxlint-shards.mjs --threads=8
[qa-channel boundary dts] fresh; skipping
[discord boundary dts] fresh; skipping
[slack boundary dts] fresh; skipping
[whatsapp boundary dts] fresh; skipping

$ node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.core.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core-test.tsbuildinfo
(exit 0; no diagnostics)
$ node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.extensions.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/extensions-test.tsbuildinfo
(exit 0; no diagnostics)
$ node scripts/check-tsgo-core-boundary.mjs
(exit 0; no diagnostics)

$ node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/discord/src/channel-actions.test.ts extensions/discord/src/actions/handle-action.test.ts extensions/discord/src/actions/runtime.test.ts extensions/discord/src/voice/manager.e2e.test.ts src/channels/plugins/message-actions.security.test.ts src/agents/command/attempt-execution.cli.test.ts src/agents/cli-runner/prepare.test.ts src/agents/tools/message-tool.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.test.ts src/gateway/mcp-http.test.ts src/gateway/tool-resolution.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/send.test.ts src/gateway/server/ws-connection/message-handler.post-connect-health.test.ts src/infra/outbound/message-action-runner.plugin-dispatch.test.ts src/agents/workspace-templates.test.ts src/agents/tools/pdf-tool.model-config.test.ts src/crestodian/rescue-message.test.ts src/tasks/task-flow-registry.store.test.ts

$ .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main
autoreview target: branch
branch: discord-action-sender-guard

ref: origin/main
autoreview clean: no accepted/actionable findings reported
overall: patch is correct (0.82)
```

Observed result after fix: The gateway/server tests show non-admin `message.action` calls strip `requesterSenderId` and `senderIsOwner`; the outbound runner tests show normal gateway actions stay least-privilege, plugin-declared trusted requester actions request `operator.admin` plus `operator.write`, and owner/no-tool-context privileged actions preserve owner trust. The Discord action tests show prompt/tool-driven privileged moderation rejects non-Discord or missing requester context while trusted Discord requester and local owner paths still work.

What was not tested: No live Discord guild moderation command was executed against a real Discord bot/guild. This proof uses the local source checkout, gateway/MCP/Discord contract tests, lint/type/boundary gates, and a fresh autoreview on the exact PR head.
target.author: mmaps
